title: Durability Overlay For OverAllPVP
description: This is the durability pack for OverAllPVP
body:
## This is the durability overlay for the OverAllPVP Texture Pack
### Show the durability of :
- armor :
    - stage 1 -> 10-20%
    - stage 2 -> 20-30%
    - stage 3 -> 30-40%
    - stage 4 -> 40-50%
    - stage 5 -> 50-60%
    - stage 6 -> 60-70%
    - stage 7 -> 70-80%
    - stage 8 -> 80-90%
    - stage 9 -> 90-100%
- elytra & shield :
    - stage 1 -> 1-20%
    - stage 2 -> 20-30%
    - stage 3 -> 30-40%
    - stage 4 -> 40-50%
    - stage 5 -> 50-60%
    - stage 6 -> 60-70%
    - stage 7 -> 70-80%
    - stage 8 -> 80-100%

**This pack needs [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) to be functional**

![Armor Durability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d28de26c9fd42ba6a13e27193e73680fa1e2228f.png)
